summary: All 4 dashboard carousel features tested and verified working. Dashboard product carousel now shows actual item names (e.g., 'LOWER') instead of generic 'Product 1', 'Product 2'. Carousel displays actual prices with currency symbols (e.g., ₹1,679.30, ₹1,960.00). Auto-scroll animation is working with CSS scroll-left animation set to 69s duration with infinite loop. Item count correctly shows 'Browse 44 products across all categories'.
passed_tests: Dashboard page loads correctly with product carousel
Product carousel shows actual item names (e.g., 'LOWER') not generic 'Product 1', 'Product 2'
Product carousel displays actual prices with INR currency (₹1,679.30, ₹1,960.00, ₹2,240.00, etc.)
Carousel auto-scrolls using CSS scroll-left animation
Animation configured with 69s duration and infinite loop
Item count text shows 'Browse 44 products across all categories' matching Total Items stat
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: DashboardPage.js line 28 - allItems state for carousel items
VERIFIED: DashboardPage.js line 52 - fetches items from /api/items?limit=50
VERIFIED: DashboardPage.js lines 488-597 - product carousel renders actual item names and prices
VERIFIED: DashboardPage.js line 534/583 - uses item.name and formatCurrency(item.selling_price)
VERIFIED: index.css lines 138-148 - scroll-left animation defined with translateX and infinite loop
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard carousel features fully implemented and verified. Carousel shows actual item names (like 'LOWER') and prices (like ₹1,679.30) from /api/items endpoint. CSS animation provides smooth auto-scroll with 69s duration and infinite loop.

actual_item_names.evidence: Carousel shows 'LOWER' instead of generic 'Product 1', 'Product 2' etc.

item_count_text.evidence: Text shows 'Browse 44 products across all categories' matching Total Items: 44
